name: Flower Cardian Willow with Calligrapher
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>花札衛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カーディアン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>柳</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やなぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>に<ruby lang="jp"><rb>小野</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おのの</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>道</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>みち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>風</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かぜ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－
name_jp_rom: Kādian - Yanagi ni Ono no Michikaze -
name_jp_tl: Cardian - Willow with Ono no Michikaze
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 1 Level 11 "Flower Cardian" monster, except "Flower Cardian Willow with Calligrapher". If this card is Special Summoned: Draw 1 card, and if you do, show it, then you can Special Summon it if it is a "Flower Cardian" monster. Otherwise, send it to the GY. When this card is used as Synchro Material, you can treat it and all other Synchro Materials (that have a Level) as Level 2 monsters.
